summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. The hydrated artifact covers 20 of 25 listed PRs; all hydrated PRs are open, non-security-sensitive, and distinct single-item PRs with no shared canonical. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is planned because this is not a dedupe cluster and job permissions disable merge/fix/low-signal closeout. Five listed candidates were not present in hydrated live state and are marked for targeted replan/human review.
